use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Showing user avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Rendering profile images in dashboard and settings interfaces
Displaying actor or user avatars in media and entertainment applications
Showing profile pictures in social features like chat and collaboration tools
ai_summary: A lightweight Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives that renders user profile images with a rounded circular design. Includes AvatarImage for the main image and AvatarFallback for graceful degradation when images fail to load. Uses clean Tailwind styling with muted background fallbacks, making it suitable for any application requiring user identification or profile display.
